title: Music CLI and Scripting
description: Essential commands and scripts for managing music files and metadata.

commands.description: List all MP3 files in a directory
commands.scenario: List all MP3 files in a directory

commands.description: Convert WAV file to MP3 using FFmpeg
commands.scenario: Convert WAV file to MP3 using FFmpeg

commands.command: for file in *.mp3; do mv "$file" "$(echo $file | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"; done
commands.description: Rename all MP3 files to lowercase
commands.scenario: Rename all MP3 files to lowercase

commands.description: Display metadata of an MP3 file using ffprobe
commands.scenario: Display metadata of an MP3 file using ffprobe

commands.description: Remove all metadata from an MP3 file
commands.scenario: Remove all metadata from an MP3 file

commands.command:
from mutagen.mp3 import MP3
mp3 = MP3('song.mp3')
print(mp3.info.length)

import os
for filename in os.listdir('.'): os.rename(filename, filename.lower())
commands.description: Batch rename MP3 files with Python
commands.scenario: Batch rename MP3 files with Python

commands.command:
from mutagen.mp3 import MP3
from mutagen.id3 import ID3, APIC
mp3 = MP3('song.mp3', ID3=ID3)
artwork = mp3.tags['APIC:'].data
with open('cover.jpg', 'wb') as img: img.write(artwork)
commands.description: Extract album art from MP3 using mutagen
commands.scenario: Extract album art from MP3 using mutagen
